author: arb1
description:
We live in an age of heroes, of riches unsurpassed, of conquest and glory, where the building of awe-inspiring wonders is but a trifle.

But with such a rich life comes consequences - lustful courtesans, treacherous mercenaries, plotting governors and way-ward siblings. A world of curse tablets, of tribal mystics and heads of religious cults. Of troublesome bandits, scheming aunts and adventures in foreign lands. Welcome to The Eye, The Witch and the Bandit King.




The Eye of Atum has been merged with two other event mods - the Thessalian Witch and the Bandit King. Combined this offers over 700 events packed full of characters (Eunuchs, Courtesans, Mercenary Generals, foreign travellers, inventors, characters based on historical people and some from period fiction), new units (mercenaries), a host of new items, banditry and the odd chicken.

New missions include Visit Governor and Visit Courtesan for the leader and Recruit Mercenaries and Source Luxuries via certain characters.
